signals.headline: Cooper Flagg Return Confirmed for Mavericks | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Cooper Flagg Return Confirmed for Mavericks | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Jason Kidd announced that Cooper Flagg, the No. 1 overall pick, will return from a long absence for the Dallas Mavericks on Thursday after official confirmation, though the Mavericks are lottery-bound and not in playoffs.[1][3]

Cavaliers Secure No. 4 Seed in East | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Cleveland Cavaliers locked in the No. 4 seed (51-30 record) in the Eastern Conference, guaranteeing home-court advantage in the first round against the No. 5 seed (e.g., possible Hawks or Raptors), with their final regular-season game on April 12.[2]
